plugins.name: agent-pack
plugins.description: Enterprise-safe agent skill pack: spec/build/review/qa/ship workflows, anti-bloat (seniorswe-concise), and optional stacks (.NET, Databricks, Spring, AWS, Postgres, SQL Server, Python, React), domain (MLOps, governance, experiment design), and adapter (MCP, GitHub, AG-UI, OpenAPI, LangGraph) packs. No public telemetry, tunnels, scraping, or unscoped credential reads.
